description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts through multiple‑choice questions, gauging both practical skill and confidence for résumé inclusion. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a light, encouraging tone to motivate learners.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern CSS features, Responsive design, CSS preprocessors, Best practices for styling
Audience: Front‑end developers and web designers looking to validate and showcase their CSS expertise, especially those preparing for job applications or skill assessments.
